common.selectServer: Select a server from the sidebar.
common.noChannels: Unable to load channels. Available after backend integration.
common.deleteConfig: Are you sure you want to delete this auto-channel config?

autoChannel.title: Auto-Channel Settings
autoChannel.triggerChannelDesc: The permanent voice channel users join to trigger room creation.
autoChannel.guideChannelDesc: The text channel where the embed and buttons will be displayed.
autoChannel.embedDescPlaceholder: Enter the guide text to display in the guide channel.
autoChannel.noButtons: No buttons yet. Click "Add Button" above.
autoChannel.channelNameTemplateDesc: '{'username'}' — user nickname, '{'n'}' — auto-increment number (e.g. Overwatch #'{'n'}' → Overwatch #1, #2, ...). Leave blank for default: {default}
autoChannel.subOptionsDesc: In the channel name template, '{'name'}' is replaced with the button's default channel name. e.g. General '{'name'}' → General Onyu's Overwatch
autoChannel.modeInstantDesc: Creates a new voice channel immediately upon joining the trigger channel
autoChannel.modeSelectDesc: Creates a channel after selecting a game from the guide message
autoChannel.validationGuideChannel: Please select a guide message channel.
autoChannel.validationGuideMessage: Please enter a guide message (Embed description).
autoChannel.validationButtonRequired: Please add at least one button.
autoChannel.validationButtonLabel: Please enter a label for Button #{index}.
autoChannel.validationButtonCategory: Please select a target category for Button #{index}.
autoChannel.validationSubOptionLabel: Please enter a label for Button #{btnIndex} sub-option #{subIndex}.
autoChannel.validationSubOptionTemplate: Please enter a channel name template for Button #{btnIndex} sub-option #{subIndex}.

voice.title: Voice Settings
voice.categoryNote: Selecting a category excludes all voice channels within it.

voiceHealth.title: Self-Diagnosis Settings
voiceHealth.analysisDaysDesc: The period to analyze voice activity. (7–90 days)
voiceHealth.cooldownDesc: Limits consecutive diagnoses for the same user.
voiceHealth.cooldownHoursDesc: Wait time before running the diagnosis again. (1–168 hours)
voiceHealth.llmSummaryDesc: Uses an LLM to generate a summary message for the diagnosis result.
voiceHealth.minActivityMinutesDesc: Minimum voice activity time within the analysis period.
voiceHealth.minActiveDaysRatioDesc: Minimum ratio of active days within the analysis period.
voiceHealth.diversityScoreDesc: Higher score means more diverse relationships. Meets criteria if at or above this score. (0–100)
voiceHealth.minPeerCountDesc: Minimum number of peers required to pass the social criteria.
voiceHealth.badgeActivityTopPercentDesc: Awards the Activity King badge to the top N% of users. (1–100)
voiceHealth.badgeSocialDiversityDesc: Awards the Social King badge when diversity score is at or above this value. (0–100)
voiceHealth.badgeSocialMinPeersDesc: Minimum number of peers required for the Social King badge.
voiceHealth.badgeHunterTopPercentDesc: Awards the Hunter badge to the top N% by channel exploration count. (1–100)
voiceHealth.badgeConsistentMinRatio: Consistent Player Min Active Days Ratio: {value}%
voiceHealth.badgeConsistentMinRatioDesc: Awards the Consistent Player badge when active days ratio meets or exceeds this value.
voiceHealth.badgeMicMinRateDesc: Awards the Communicator badge when mic usage rate meets or exceeds this value.

newbie.title: Newbie Management Settings
newbie.validationMissionChannel: Please select a mission notification channel.
newbie.validationMocoChannel: Please select a Moco ranking channel.

welcome.toggleDesc: Automatically sends a welcome message when a new member joins.
welcome.contentDesc: Text displayed outside the embed. Mentions (@) should be placed here to display correctly.
welcome.channelLinkDesc: Clickable channel link (insert via dropdown above)

mission.toggleDesc: Assigns a voice channel playtime mission to new members.
mission.durationDaysDesc: Mission duration (days) after a new member joins
mission.targetPlaytimeDesc: Minimum voice channel playtime (hours) required to complete the mission
mission.useMicTime: Count only mic-on time toward target
mission.useMicTimeDesc: When enabled, only mic-on time is accumulated instead of channel-presence time.
mission.useMicTimeWarning: Changing this option immediately recalculates the accumulated playtime of all in-progress missions on the new basis.
mission.targetPlayCountDesc: Leave empty to judge completion by playtime only, without a play count requirement.
mission.notifyChannelDesc: Channel to display mission status embed messages
mission.playCountMinDurationDesc: Only sessions with total participation time of N minutes or more count as one valid play. Uncheck to disable (all sessions count).
mission.playCountIntervalDesc: Sessions re-joining within N minutes of the previous valid session start are merged as one. Uncheck to disable (independent count).
mission.displayModeDesc: Select how mission status is displayed.
mission.canvasInfo: In Canvas mode, mission status is displayed as an image table. A progress bar visually shows playtime achievement, and images are sent in batches of 10 members.

moco.toggleDesc: Tracks time existing members spend in voice channels with new members.
moco.newbieDaysDesc: Members who joined within this many days are considered Moco (newbies).
moco.allowNewbieHunterDesc: When enabled, newbies (Moco) can also be hunters of other newbies.
moco.rankChannelDesc: Channel to display the Moco Hunt TOP N ranking embed
moco.autoRefreshMinutesDesc: Interval (minutes) to automatically refresh the ranking embed
moco.playCountMinDurationDesc: Only sessions with total participation time of N minutes or more count as one valid play. Uncheck to disable (all sessions count).
moco.playCountIntervalDesc: Sessions re-joining within N minutes of the previous valid session start are merged as one. Uncheck to disable (independent count).
moco.minCoPresenceMinDesc: Short sessions below this duration are not counted as hunts.
moco.displayModeDesc: Choose how Moco Hunt rankings are displayed.
moco.canvasInfo: In Canvas mode, rankings are displayed as an image table. 10 hunters are shown per page, and users can view their personal details via the 'My Rank' button.

role.toggleDesc: Automatically assigns a newbie period role to new members and removes it upon expiry.
role.durationDaysDesc: Duration (days) until the role is automatically removed
role.newbieRoleDesc: Discord role to automatically assign to new members
role.noRoles: Unable to load roles. Available after backend integration.

stickyMessage.title: Sticky Message Settings
stickyMessage.textChannelDesc: Text channel to display the sticky message
stickyMessage.noChannels: Unable to load channels. Available after backend integration.
stickyMessage.enableFeatureDesc: When enabled, the sticky message is sent/updated in the designated channel immediately upon saving.
stickyMessage.deleteConfirm: Deleting this sticky message will also immediately remove it from the channel. Are you sure?

statusPrefix.title: Game Room Status Settings
statusPrefix.enableFeatureDesc: When enabled, the Embed + button message is sent/updated in the designated channel immediately upon saving.
statusPrefix.guideChannelDesc: Text channel to display the Embed + button message
statusPrefix.noChannels: Unable to load channels. Available after backend integration.
statusPrefix.prefixTemplateDesc: Template used to transform nicknames. e.g. [Spectate] Donghyun
statusPrefix.varPrefix: Prefix text set on the button
statusPrefix.buttonListDesc: Up to 25 buttons can be registered on Discord.
statusPrefix.noButtons: No buttons registered. Add a button.
statusPrefix.validationButtonLabel: Please enter a label for Button #{index}.
statusPrefix.validationButtonPrefix: Please enter prefix text for Button #{index}.

music.title: Music Settings
music.description: Configure the embed and buttons for your dedicated music channel.
music.enableFeatureDesc: When enabled, the music player embed will be displayed in the designated channel.
music.channelDesc: Saving after selecting a channel will automatically send/update the pinned embed message in that channel.
music.validationChannel: Please select a dedicated music channel.
music.thumbnailUrlDesc: Enter the thumbnail image URL to display in the idle state embed.
music.validationThumbnailUrl: Please enter a valid URL format.
music.buttonSettingsDesc: Configure the buttons displayed in the music player. Up to 5 buttons can be placed in the same row.
music.resetSettingsDesc: Resets the embed settings (title, description, color, thumbnail) and button configuration to defaults. Channel selection is preserved.
music.resetConfirm: The embed settings and button configuration will be reset to defaults. Do you want to continue?

weeklyReport.title: Weekly Report Settings
weeklyReport.enableDescription: A server voice activity report will be automatically sent to the selected channel at the specified day and time each week.
weeklyReport.validationChannelRequired: You must select a channel to enable the report.

inactiveMember.title: Inactive Member Settings
inactiveMember.lowActiveThresholdDesc: Members with total connection time below this value within the evaluation period are classified as low-active.
inactiveMember.decliningPercentDesc: Members whose connection time decreased by this percentage or more compared to the same previous period are classified as declining.
inactiveMember.gracePeriodDaysDesc: Members who joined the server within this period are excluded from inactivity classification.
inactiveMember.gracePeriodDaysZeroWarn: Setting this to 0 means all members will be classified with no grace period.
inactiveMember.autoActionEnableDesc: When the scheduler runs, automatically applies actions to members newly classified as fully inactive.
inactiveMember.autoRoleAddDesc: Automatically assigns the inactive role when a member is classified as fully inactive.
inactiveMember.autoDmDesc: Automatically sends a DM using the DM template when a member is classified as fully inactive.
inactiveMember.excludedRolesDesc: Select roles to exclude from inactivity checks. (e.g. Admins, Bot roles)
